member.name: T:GDCubismParameterCS.MethodName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the methods contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:GDCubismParameterCS.PropertyName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the properties and fields contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: M:GDCubismParameterCS.GetGodotPropertyList
member.summary: Get the property information for all the properties declared in this class. This method is used by Godot to register the available properties in the editor. Do not call this method.

member.name: T:GDCubismParameterCS.SignalName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the signals contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:GDCubismPartOpacityCS.MethodName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the methods contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:GDCubismPartOpacityCS.PropertyName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the properties and fields contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:GDCubismPartOpacityCS.SignalName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the signals contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: F:GDCubismUserModelCS.MotionProcessCallbackEnum.Physics
member.summary: The animation update process is performed within the _physics_process function. This is used when you want to interact with physical simulations.

member.name: F:GDCubismUserModelCS.MotionProcessCallbackEnum.Idle
member.summary: The animation update process is performed within the _process function.

member.name: F:GDCubismUserModelCS.MotionProcessCallbackEnum.Manual
member.summary: No animation update process is performed. Use the advance function to process the animation.

member.name: P:GDCubismUserModelCS.Assets
member.value:
Property Assets
You can load a Live2D model by specifying a file with the *.model3.json extension. The file is loaded immediately upon specification.
if you want to switch the Live2D model, you can do so simply by specifying a new file.

member.name: P:GDCubismUserModelCS.LoadExpressions
member.value:
Property LoadExpressions
If set to false, it will not load _Expressions_ when loading the Live2D Model.

member.name: P:GDCubismUserModelCS.LoadMotions
member.value:
Property LoadMotions
If set to false, it will not load _Motions_ when loading the Live2D Model.

member.name: P:GDCubismUserModelCS.MaskViewportSize
member.value:
Property MaskViewportSize
Specify the maximum resolution for any individual mask required for the Live2D model.
If set to 0, size of the mask will be relative to the source pixel resolution of the model's canvas.
Mask resolution is also dynamically resized relative to the model's scale within its viewport.
Reducing the resolution can help conserve GPU memory, however reducing resolution too far can cause visual issues where masks are applied.
For many, it's best to leave this at default and rely solely on the automatic scaling.

member.name: P:GDCubismUserModelCS.ParameterMode
member.value:
Property ParameterMode
Specifies the control method for the currently held Live2D model.

member.name: P:GDCubismUserModelCS.PhysicsEvaluate
member.value:
Property PhysicsEvaluate
Setting this parameter to `false` disables physical calculations.

member.name: P:GDCubismUserModelCS.PlaybackProcessMode
member.value:
Property PlaybackProcessMode
Specifies the playback method for the currently held Live2D model.

member.name: P:GDCubismUserModelCS.PoseUpdate
member.value:
Property PoseUpdate
Setting this parameter to `false` disables transparency calculations between drawing parts specified in the pose group. If you want to manually handle all transparency calculations, set this parameter to `false`.

member.name: P:GDCubismUserModelCS.SpeedScale
member.value:
Property SpeedScale
Specifies the playback speed for the currently held Live2D model.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.Advance(System.Double)
member.summary: Advances the animation by the specified delta time (in seconds). Please specify a value of 0.0 or more for delta.
member.param: The time to progress the animation.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.CsmGetLatestMocVersion
member.summary: Returns the latest file version that GDCubismUserModel can load.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.CsmGetMocVersion
member.summary: Returns the version of the loaded moc3 file.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.CsmGetVersion
member.summary:
Returns the version number of the Cubism Native SDK Core used by GDCubism in Dictionary format
version int: The value returned by the csmVersion function is stored as is.
major int: Only the major version is extracted from the version and stored.
minor int: Only the minor version is extracted from the version and stored.
patch int: Only the patch number is extracted from the version and stored.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.GetCanvasInfo
member.summary:
Returns the following information in Dictionary format.
size_in_pixels Vector2: Returns the width and height of the canvas of the loaded Live2D model in pixels.
origin_in_pixels Vector2: Returns the center position of the loaded Live2D model in pixels.
ixels_per_unit float: Returns the pixelsPerUnit of the loaded Live2D model.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.GetCubismMotionQueueEntries
member.summary: Returns the information of the Motion currently being played.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.GetExpressions
member.summary: Returns a list of Expressions from the currently held Live2D model. The information obtained can be used as an argument for the start_expression function.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.GetMeshes
member.summary:
Retrieves the ArrayMesh information of the MeshInstance used in the current Motion state. The keys held by this Dictionary are identical to the names of the MeshInstance generated by GDCubismUserModel.
The information that can be obtained is the ArrayMesh used internally.
CAUTION
get_meshes is an experimental function added in v0.1. Please be aware that the specifications may change or be removed in the future.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.GetMotions
member.summary: Returns a list of Motions from the currently held Live2D model. The returned Dictionary is the group and the number of motions it contains.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.GetParameters
member.summary: Retrieves the controller class for operating the currently held Live2D model.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.GetPartOpacities
member.summary: Retrieves the controller class for operating the transparency of the parts of the currently held Live2D model.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.StartMotion(System.String,System.Int32,GDCubismUserModelCS.PriorityEnum)
member.summary: Plays the specified group and no.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.StartMotionLoop(System.String,System.Int32,GDCubismUserModelCS.PriorityEnum,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Plays the specified group and no. If you want to play it repeatedly, specify it. If the loop argument is false, it will behave the same as the start_motion function.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.StopExpression
member.summary: It stops the currently playing Expression.

member.name: M:GDCubismUserModelCS.StopMotion
member.summary: It stops the currently playing Motion.

member.summary: Cached StringNames for the methods contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.summary: Get the property information for all the properties declared in this class. This method is used by Godot to register the available properties in the editor. Do not call this method.

member.summary: Get the property information for all the properties declared in this class. This method is used by Godot to register the available properties in the editor. Do not call this method.

member.summary: Cached StringNames for the signals contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle
member.summary:
Stable handle for one model in one scene. The handle remains valid when the underlying Godot nodes are rebuilt and reports availability through .
中文：句柄在场景重建后仍保持有效；实际节点是否可用请检查 。

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.ModelId
member.summary: Runtime model ID unique within a scene.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.PackId
member.summary: Registered Pack ID, or null for a user-managed model.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.ModelKey
member.summary: Stable model key inside its Pack.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.Scene
member.summary: Scene in which this handle is instantiated.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.IsAvailable
member.summary: Whether the handle is currently bound to a live scene instance.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.Actions
member.summary: Actions declared by the model, available even before scene binding.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.Snapshot
member.summary:
Current live or last-known model state. Read on the Godot main thread.
中文：只能在 Godot 主线程读取；节点暂不可用时返回最后一次状态。

member.name: E:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.BecameAvailable
member.summary: Raised on the Godot main thread after a scene instance is bound.

member.name: E:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.BecameUnavailable
member.summary: Raised on the Godot main thread after a scene instance is unbound.

member.name: E:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.MotionFinished
member.summary: Raised when the active non-looping motion finishes.

member.name: E:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.MotionEvent
member.summary: Raised for a Cubism motion event; the second argument is its event string.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.WaitUntilAvailableAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Completes when this stable handle is bound to a live scene instance. Returns immediately when it is already available and can be called from any thread.
中文：可从任意线程等待模型绑定，不需要轮询。

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.WaitUntilUnavailableAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Completes when this stable handle is no longer bound to a live scene instance. Returns immediately when it is already unavailable and can be called from any thread.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.Apply(Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate)
member.summary:
Applies a partial transient state update on the Godot main thread.
中文：立即更新必须在主线程调用；未赋值字段保持不变。

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.Update(System.Action{Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate})
member.summary: Builds and applies a partial transient state update on the main thread.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.QueueUpdate(Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate)
member.summary:
Queues a state update from any thread. Pending updates for this model are merged, with the most recently submitted value winning for each field.
中文：可从任意线程调用；同一字段在执行前只保留最后一次提交值。

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.QueueUpdate(System.Action{Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate})
member.summary: Builds and queues a mergeable state update from any thread. Ordered commands such as motions and expressions are intentionally not part of this update.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.SetUniformScale(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets equal positive X/Y model-root scale.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.SetRotation(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets clockwise model-root rotation in degrees.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.SetOpacity(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets model opacity, clamped to 0 through 1.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.SetPoseEnabled(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables Cubism pose updates.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.SetExpression(System.String)
member.summary: Starts a Cubism expression by ID.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.GetParameters
member.summary: Returns current Cubism parameter metadata and values.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.TryGetParameter(System.String,Live2D.Api.Live2DParameterInfo@)
member.summary: Tries to find a Cubism parameter by case-insensitive ID.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.SetParameter(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets one Cubism parameter, clamped to its model range.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.SetParameters(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Single})
member.summary: Validates and sets a batch of Cubism parameters atomically.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.QueueParameter(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Queues a dynamic Cubism parameter value from any thread. Pending values are coalesced by case-insensitive parameter ID.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.QueueParameters(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Single})
member.summary: Queues and coalesces a batch of dynamic Cubism parameter values.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.TryGetPart(System.String,Live2D.Api.Live2DPartInfo@)
member.summary: Tries to find a Cubism part by case-insensitive ID.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.SetPartOpacity(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets one Cubism part opacity, clamped to 0 through 1.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.SetPartOpacities(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Single})
member.summary: Validates and sets a batch of Cubism part opacities atomically.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.QueuePartOpacity(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Queues a Cubism part opacity from any thread. Pending values are coalesced by case-insensitive part ID.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle.QueuePartOpacities(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Single})
member.summary: Queues and coalesces a batch of Cubism part opacity values.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DActionType
member.summary: Kind of action declared by a model.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DActionInfo
member.summary: An action declared by a model inside a registered pack.
member.param: Motion group, or empty for an expression.
Motion index, or -1 for an expression.
Expression ID, or empty for a motion.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DActionInfo.#ctor(Live2D.Api.Live2DActionType,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: An action declared by a model inside a registered pack.
member.param: Motion group, or empty for an expression.
Motion index, or -1 for an expression.
Expression ID, or empty for a motion.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DActionInfo.MotionGroup
member.summary: Motion group, or empty for an expression.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DActionInfo.MotionIndex
member.summary: Motion index, or -1 for an expression.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DActionInfo.ExpressionId
member.summary: Expression ID, or empty for a motion.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DPackModelInfo
member.summary: A read-only model entry exposed by a registered Live2D pack.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DPackModelInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Live2D.Api.Live2DActionInfo})
member.summary: A read-only model entry exposed by a registered Live2D pack.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.ILive2DPackHandle
member.summary:
Handle for a provider-owned Live2D pack registered in the central model library.
中文：其他 Mod 注册到统一模型库的只读资源 Pack 句柄。

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DPackHandle.OwnerModId
member.summary: Mod ID that registered this pack.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DPackHandle.IsRegistered
member.summary: Whether this pack remains registered for the current session.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.ILive2DPackHandle.Models
member.summary: Read-only models declared by this pack.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DPackHandle.Unregister
member.summary:
Unregisters the provider assets. User configuration remains in the model library.
中文：注销提供方资源；玩家在模型库中的配置会保留。

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.ILive2DProviderLifecycleHook
member.summary: Provider-scoped lifecycle hooks for custom character behavior. Live2D retains ownership of model configuration and scene instances.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DProviderLifecycleHook.OnPackRegistered(Live2D.Api.ILive2DPackHandle)
member.summary: Called after provider assets are registered, before model instances are refreshed.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DProviderLifecycleHook.OnModelAvailable(Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle)
member.summary: Called when a provider model is bound and can accept playback commands.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DProviderLifecycleHook.OnModelUnavailable(Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle)
member.summary: Called after a provider model is unbound; cancel pending custom behavior here.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.ILive2DProviderLifecycleHook.OnPackUnregistered(Live2D.Api.ILive2DPackHandle)
member.summary: Called after provider assets are removed from the current session.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi
member.summary:
Public runtime entry point for other Slay the Spire 2 mods.
中文：其他 Mod 接入 Live2D 运行时的统一入口。

member.name: F:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.PackageFileExtension
member.summary: The only supported filename extension for a Live2D package.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.RuntimeApiVersion
member.summary: Runtime API capability version. Prefer this property over the compile-time constant when diagnosing a loaded runtime.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.RuntimeVersion
member.summary: Version of the currently loaded Live2D runtime Mod.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.IsDispatcherReady
member.summary: Whether the Live2D Godot main-thread dispatcher is ready.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.IsMainThread
member.summary: Whether the current caller is running on the Live2D Godot main thread.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.Post(System.Action)
member.summary: Schedules fire-and-forget work on the Godot main thread. Callback exceptions are written to the Live2D log. Use when the caller must observe completion or exceptions.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.InvokeAsync(System.Action,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs work on the Godot main thread and returns a task that represents its completion. Cancellation prevents a callback that has not started yet.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.InvokeAsync``1(System.Func{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs a function on the Godot main thread and returns its result. Cancellation prevents a callback that has not started yet.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.GetModels
member.summary: Returns all handles that have been observed during this game session.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.GetModels(System.String)
member.summary: Returns handles owned by one mod, including currently unavailable handles.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.RegisterProviderHook(System.String,Live2D.Api.ILive2DProviderLifecycleHook)
member.summary: Registers provider-scoped lifecycle hooks for custom character behavior. Existing packs and available models are replayed immediately in lifecycle order. Call on the Godot main thread; callbacks also run on that thread. Dispose the returned subscription to stop receiving callbacks.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.GetModel(System.String,Live2D.Api.Live2DScene)
member.summary: Returns a stable handle, or null if this model/scene has not been created yet.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.TryGetModel(System.String,Live2D.Api.Live2DScene,Live2D.Api.ILive2DModelHandle@)
member.summary: Tries to find a stable handle by runtime model ID and scene.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.ImportPack(System.String)
member.summary: Imports a user-managed .live2dpack from an operating-system path or a Godot res:///user:// path.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.ImportPack(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte})
member.summary: Imports a user-managed Live2D pack from in-memory archive data.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.RegisterPack(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a provider-owned pack in the central Live2D model library. Live2D owns visibility, layout, actions, hotkeys and scene instances.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DApi.RegisterPack(System.String,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte})
member.summary: Registers an in-memory provider-owned pack in the central model library.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DMainThreadDispatcher.MethodName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the methods contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DMainThreadDispatcher.GetGodotMethodList
member.summary: Get the method information for all the methods declared in this class. This method is used by Godot to register the available methods in the editor. Do not call this method.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DMainThreadDispatcher.PropertyName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the properties and fields contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DMainThreadDispatcher.SignalName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the signals contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelSnapshot
member.summary: Current runtime state of a rendered Live2D model instance.
member.param: Whether a live scene instance is bound.
Whether Cubism pose updates are enabled.

member.summary: Current runtime state of a rendered Live2D model instance.
member.param: Whether a live scene instance is bound.
Whether Cubism pose updates are enabled.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelSnapshot.IsAvailable
member.summary: Whether a live scene instance is bound.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelSnapshot.PoseEnabled
member.summary: Whether Cubism pose updates are enabled.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DPlaybackSnapshot
member.summary: Currently commanded motion and expression state for a model instance.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DPlaybackSnapshot.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Currently commanded motion and expression state for a model instance.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DPlaybackSnapshot.HasMotion
member.summary: Whether a motion is currently commanded.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DPlaybackSnapshot.HasExpression
member.summary: Whether an expression is currently commanded.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DParameterInfo
member.summary: Metadata and current value for a Cubism parameter.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DParameterInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Metadata and current value for a Cubism parameter.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DPartInfo
member.summary: Metadata and current value for a Cubism part opacity controller.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DPartInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Metadata and current value for a Cubism part opacity controller.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate
member.summary:
Describes a partial, transient update for one rendered Live2D model instance. Unspecified properties retain their current value.
中文：只填写需要修改的字段；未填写字段沿用当前值。

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate.Scale
member.summary: Model-root scale. Components must be finite and non-zero.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate.Opacity
member.summary: Model opacity, clamped to the range 0 through 1.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate.PlaybackSpeed
member.summary: Cubism playback speed. Negative values are treated as zero.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate.PhysicsEnabled
member.summary: Whether Cubism physics evaluation is enabled.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate.PoseEnabled
member.summary: Whether Cubism pose updates are enabled.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DModelUpdate.MaskViewportSize
member.summary: Cubism drawable-mask viewport size. Negative values are treated as zero.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DPackImportResult
member.summary: Result of importing a Live2D pack into the user's managed model library.
member.param: Number of models added to the managed library.
Number of models skipped as duplicate content.

member.name: M:Live2D.Api.Live2DPackImportResult.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Result of importing a Live2D pack into the user's managed model library.
member.param: Number of models added to the managed library.
Number of models skipped as duplicate content.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DPackImportResult.ImportedModels
member.summary: Number of models added to the managed library.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DPackImportResult.SkippedDuplicates
member.summary: Number of models skipped as duplicate content.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DBlendMode
member.summary: Blend operation used when the composited model is drawn.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DMaskType
member.summary: Built-in canvas mask shapes. Coordinates are local to the model instance.

member.name: F:Live2D.Api.Live2DMaskType.Ellipse
member.summary: Ellipse fitted inside the configured rectangle.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DFilterSettings
member.summary: Color adjustments applied to the whole composited model. Neutral values leave the rendered image unchanged.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DFilterSettings.Tint
member.summary: Multiplicative RGBA tint; default is white.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DMaskSettings
member.summary: Canvas crop/mask applied in model-local coordinates. Rendered ellipse and rounded-rectangle edges are evaluated analytically by the composite shader.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DMaskSettings.CornerRadius
member.summary: Rounded-rectangle corner radius; must be non-negative.

member.name: P:Live2D.Api.Live2DMaskSettings.SegmentsPerCorner
member.summary: Preview-outline sampling density, from 2 through 64; rendered crop edges are analytic.

member.name: T:Live2D.Api.Live2DScene
member.summary: Built-in host scenes currently supported by the Live2D runtime.

member.name: F:Live2D.Api.Live2DScene.InGame
member.summary: Map and combat scenes, which share one configuration.

member.name: M:Live2D.Scripts.Runtime.Live2DHotkeyManager.TryNormalizeBinding(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: RitsuLib currently parses a bare numeric token through Enum.TryParse, so "1" becomes enum value 1 instead of Godot Key.Key1 (49). Use Godot's explicit KeyN enum name for runtime registration while keeping the stored and displayed form user-friendly.

member.name: T:Live2D.Scripts.Runtime.Live2DPlaybackController.MethodName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the methods contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: M:Live2D.Scripts.Runtime.Live2DPlaybackController.GetGodotMethodList
member.summary: Get the method information for all the methods declared in this class. This method is used by Godot to register the available methods in the editor. Do not call this method.

member.name: T:Live2D.Scripts.UI.Live2DActionKeyBindingControl
member.summary: Captures action hotkeys during the regular input phase so bare keys such as 1-9 cannot be consumed by the surrounding game UI before reaching the editor.
